text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, the final hurdle of the Classic
Triple Crown, is here at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru—a runner who's just entering
her prime and who has also dominated the
preliminary match—issues a challenge to Mejiro
Bright.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Will Mejiro Bright's sleeper stayer abilities be
enough to compete against such a runner?
